purpose: Define the L5 operating-evidence matrix for the OPL brand modules without converting structural readiness into production maturity.
machine_boundary: This contract records the evidence classes, owner routes, accepted ref shapes, immediate enabling surfaces, and false-completion boundaries required before any OPL brand module can claim L5 production operating maturity. It does not store domain truth, artifact or memory bodies, quality verdicts, owner receipts, typed blockers, App release truth, install success, long-soak results, or production-ready verdicts.

evidence_classes.definition: A real user or operator can exercise the module through its ordinary path and inspect the accepted result shape.

The ordinary App and operator read surfaces expose running fluency, output quality language, and brand feel as refs-only display grammar without claiming L5, release ready, production ready, or quality verdicts.
The module works across MAS, MAG, RCA, and OMA or records a per-agent owner blocker.
Longer-window operation, retry/dead-letter, restore, or recovery evidence is recorded and replayable.
Release, install, descriptor, package, or distribution evidence is tied to the same semantic source.
The operator can see the current owner, accepted answer shape, repair action, and evidence closure route.
The responsible module, domain, App, or release owner accepts the outcome or records a typed blocker.
Tests, contracts, or scans prevent retired aliases, compatibility wrappers, false authority, or second truth sources from returning.
Generated/hosted surfaces, pack locks, and direct domain entries produce equivalent callable/ref boundaries without giving OPL domain authority.
The ordinary CLI/App/operator read root is current_owner_delta, with raw worklist, evidence, replay, provider trace, and L5 ledgers kept as drilldown.

Optional capability registry refs remain advisory/audit and fail open unless the active owner delta needs them for source, owner identity, forbidden write, irreversible mutation, or hard reviewer/publication gates.

OPL modules, Vault, Console, Runway, Pack, and capability registry projections all prove false authority flags for domain truth, artifact authority, memory body, owner receipt, typed blocker, and quality/export verdicts.
MAS, MAG, RCA, and OMA adopt the same Foundry Agent OS target shape or record per-agent owner blockers.

evidence_requirements.owner: OPL Framework and App product owners
